title: Partner Marketing Lead B2B
summary: Senior B2B marketing leadership role requiring 10+ years of FMCG/food-tech experience, native German, and team management — Boru's seniority level and German fluency are significantly below the stated requirements.
key_requirements: 10+ years B2B (trade) marketing experience in FMCG or food-tech environment (required)
Proven experience leading and developing teams (required)
Native German speaker, fluent in English (required)
Proven track record in large global matrix structure (required)
Annual/quarterly partner marketing plan development with budget management (required)
Data-driven and customer-centric way of working (required)
Strong project management and cross-functional collaboration skills (required)
Willingness to travel to Amsterdam ~1x per month (required)
matched_skills: B2B marketing experience (campaign analytics, lead funnel, trade fair activations at IPC and GRG)
Data-driven approach and analytical skills (KPI tracking, ROI measurement, conversion analysis)
Campaign performance optimisation and KPI reporting
missing_skills: 10+ years of B2B marketing experience (Boru has ~5 years total across all roles)
FMCG or food delivery industry background
Partner marketing or trade marketing (B2B channel activation) at scale
Global matrix organisation navigation at senior level
recommended_emphasis: B2B campaign analytics and ROI tracking from IPC and GRG roles
Cross-functional collaboration and stakeholder data storytelling (HSBC programme analytics)
Data-driven go-to-market strategy support and competitive intelligence work
language_requirement: Native German (zwingend) + fluent English — Boru's German B1+ is a critical gap
location_notes: Berlin, hybrid (3 days office); Boru is based in Lüneburg — relocation or long commute required
risk_flags: German language requirement is NATIVE — Boru's B1+ is far below threshold
10+ years experience required — Boru has ~5 years across all roles including student jobs
Team leadership of 3 FTEs required — no direct report management in Boru's CV
FMCG or food-tech industry background expected — not present in Boru's experience
Berlin office presence 3 days/week — Boru is based in Lüneburg
